Physical AI

Map & timeline

On this page
Published May 5, 2026

Physical AI Map ​

This page is a living snapshot of themes in Physical AI and mobile manipulation: a mind map (topic tree) plus a timeline (eras / quarters). Shorter “what moved” notes can accumulate in Tech Logs when you want a dated record without a separate quarterly page.

For Mobile ALOHA: Learning Bimanual Mobile Manipulation with Low-Cost Whole-Body Teleoperation, the citation graph (papers as nodes, citations as edges) lives on third-party sites. Everything below opens in a new tab; use the mind map and timeline on this page for topic buckets and time framing.

External resources · Mobile ALOHA

The live Connected Papers graph cannot be embedded here (remote X-Frame-Options / frame-ancestors block cross-origin iframes). Use the list links instead.

  • Connected Papers ↗Interactive citation graph for this paper
  • arXiv preprint ↗Abstract, PDF, and BibTeX
  • Project website ↗Videos, hardware notes, and pointers to code

Timeline (curated) ​

Rendering timeline…

Topic mind map ​

Rendering mind map…

How to read it ​

  • Timeline — coarse eras and quarterly emphasis; edit in docs/.vitepress/theme/components/PhysicalAiTimeline.vue.
  • Mind map — hierarchical topics; edit in docs/.vitepress/theme/components/PhysicalAiMindmap.vue.
  • Tech Logs — dated notes and promoted threads live under Tech Logs.
  • External resources — citation graph, arXiv, and project links in the panel above (all external).

Related notes ​

  • Weekly context: Tech Logs
  • Deeper references: Reading
